title: log creator finder | findshit
description: Add the creator of the corresponding log in last.log
body:
When playing the integrated package, sometimes we may see many inexplicable logs in latest.log. It takes some time to find the creator of these logs. This simple mod can help players find the creators of these strange logs. Players only need to check the next line of the corresponding log to see the creator of the log.

before
![加mod前](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06b9e3352dfcea35c2b60d40cda89ebfaf3f9189.png)
![加mod前](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e444bb126eb385ac3dafd58d4711b9c2f6e1efd.png)

after
![加mod后](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5723f0e028c308a2fd80f437536ef0fab3cf2d0b.png)
![加mod后](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c4256dea42438ed58c37e9695491d37babddfa2.png)
![加mod后](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/634aefbbede3742ed231b4e8d8b80c9d541a42be.png)

Mod do not have much value, it's just convenient for players to troubleshoot errors. 

You can see that the mod name is only for some junk logs in the logs, without any intention of targeting mods. 
I have a respectful attitude towards the vast majority of mod authors
